title: rhynchosia effusa
intro: Rhynchosia effusa, also known as the climbing milkpea or sensitive plant, is a perennial vine native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhynchosia effusa include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
